race.comment: SIR WINNIE (9) was handy saluting at Doomben last time out and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Winning rider Jones sticks in the stirrups and should be right there at the business end. DON'TCHA THINK (2) is an honest commodity who has remarkably hit the top-five at his past 12 outings. Has to be included in exotics. AMAHNI'S GIRL (10) grows a leg for hoop Turner who is yet to miss a drum in four rides. In the mix. PISTON REBEL (11) strips fitter second-up from the spell and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. ROCK THE SUNRISE (8) rounds out the selections in a competitive contest.

favourite.owners: Mrs A P Curran & Mrs P V Pearson
